_comment: Realms v1.5 Pass 4 adjacency seed. Authored by Scott during Wednesday Apr 22 prep period (Decision F hand-author). Edge types: 'land' | 'coastal' | 'naval_required' | 'impassable'. Format: each row lists zone_number pairs (not UUIDs) — the loader script joins against sub_zones.zone_number at load time. Adjacencies are symmetric — list each pair ONCE (a < b by convention).
